chip_png.render: PIL macro — pink felt #d4899a, black #080808, exact imprint + pin count from catalog

chip_mirror.note: byte-identical copy of chip_png for Queen /world/ static serve

book_cover.render: Explaining {Language} cover — title from LANG_LABELS, command count from seed

registry.note: sha256 of every expected file — compare across machines; content hashes stable when seeds unchanged

chip_catalog.repair: restore from git or sibling clone; never hand-edit PNGs

program_seed.repair: restore from git; language_packs commands drive manual text

h7_packer.repair: required on any machine that packs or verifies .h7

generator.repair: restore from git — all generated assets rebuild from this module

repair.cross_machine: Any NEXUS_INSTALL_ROOT with sources + generator rebuilds all generated files. No PNG/H7 binary transfer required.
order: 1. Restore source JSON + lib/field-combinatronic-visuals.py + Hostess7/scripts/field_h7_book.py from git or donor clone
3. field-combinatronic-visuals.py repair — regenerate only broken rows
